creator: anders@fix.no
text:
Kernel freezes upon executing mdconfig commands. Leaves pc speaker beeping if
executed remotely through ssh (at least here).

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 
Run this:

# mdconfig -a -t swap -u 0
# mdconfig -d -u 0
kernel: type 12 trap, code=0
Stopped at	devstat_remove_entry+0x3e:	cmpl	%eax,0(%edx)
db>
